_source: Extracted from Documentation Standards + example KC articles
_note: Seed list for organizational terms. These override dynamic inference. Dynamic UI terms (button labels, card names, tab names) come from crawl/behavior rules.

roles._rule: Always capitalize. Never substitute with generic terms like 'person' or 'individual'.

application._rule: Always refer to the application as 'YourApp'. Never 'the app', 'the system', 'the platform', or 'the website'.
application.name: YourApp

navigation._rule: These are standard navigation/UI areas referenced across multiple articles. Bold when used as UI labels in How To steps. Do not bold in What's New Introduction sections.

modules._rule: Capitalize module names. These correspond to main navigation sections.

ui_patterns._rule: Standard UI element names used across the app. Bold the exact wording when referencing in steps.

feature_names._rule: Capitalize feature or module names as proper nouns.

login_terminology._rule_noun: Use 'login' (one word) when referring to a button, link, screen label, or as an adjective. E.g., 'login credentials', 'Login button'.
login_terminology._rule_verb: Use 'log in' (two words) when instructing an action. E.g., 'After you log in to YourApp'.

numbers.rule: Spell out one through nine; use numerals for 10 and above.

ui_elements_bold.how_to: Bold UI elements in all steps
ui_elements_bold.whats_new: Bold UI elements ONLY in the 'Where to Find It' section. Do NOT bold in Introduction.

organizational_terms._rule: Organization-specific terms. Use exactly as listed. Customize this section for your organization.
organizational_terms._note: Add your organization-specific terms here. These will be enforced in generated articles.
